title: budgets
subtitle: spending envelopes for trips, projects, and goals
formHint: set a total and optional date range — dated budgets reserve cash on projections
datedBudgetHint: full total shows on projections until the last day, then actual spent — finish early to lock in spent immediately
openEndedBudgetHint: no projection until you spend — expenses appear on ~/expenses
emptyList: > no budgets yet. add one above.
finishConfirmBody: this closes the budget and moves it to history. projections will use actual spent instead of the reserved total. you won't be able to add more expenses.
